_units: weight in A, tau in s, delay in s
_role: Slow global inhibition from I onto E1, E2
_design: tau_s ~ 100 ms — matched to syn_E_to_I so the E→I→E loop has a single 'slow' timescale separate from intrinsic self-E (~5 ms). A brief I spike lingers across roughly one E-ISI. Weight chosen so steady-state Is2 from a few-Hz I rate exceeds the E neurons' (I_0 - I_min) margin.
